summary: Systems Analyst with over 8 years of professional experience, specializing in high-scalability backend architectures using Java (Spring Boot) and Python. Proven track record leading technical teams and driving platform engineering through AWS and Google Cloud. Brings 8 years of pedagogical experience, translating complex logical problems into clear, manageable solutions. Experienced in QA Automation and Testing Funcional.

experience.description: Led the analysis, architecture design, and development of various projects. Developed RESTful APIs using Java (Spring Boot) for internship management platform (UTN-Conecta). Engineered mobile-ready backend for fitness enthusiasts (Gym Flow). Built robust Python e-commerce backends with RBAC and optimized SQL queries. Containerized applications using Docker and managed workflows using Scrum methodologies in Jira.

experience.role: QA Analyst / Functional & Game Tester Intern
experience.description: Completed an intensive 80-hour certification in Functional Testing and Game Testing. Designed comprehensive test cases and executed regressions within CI/CD environments to ensure operational reliability. Managed defects and incident metrics using Jira, collaborating on quality standards for critical business flows.

Evaluated and optimized complex code snippets in Java, Python, and SQL generated by Large Language Models to ensure logical consistency and adherence to best practices. Performed high-level technical auditing of AI responses, focusing on mathematical reasoning, algorithmic efficiency, and architectural integrity.

experience.company: Instituto Privado Mixto San Agustín, IPET 249 Nicolás Copérnico (+ other schools)
experience.description: Designed and delivered programming classes, breaking down complex logical problems into manageable teaching units. Trained students in programming logic, algorithms, and algebra. Managed classroom environments and provided timely, constructive feedback.

Developed personalized lessons and didactic code examples for advanced programming concepts, including Data Structures, Algorithms, Object-Oriented Programming (OOP), and database interactions using Java, Python, and SQL.

projects.name: UTN-Conecta
projects.description: A community-focused platform for internship management. Developed the backend in Java with Spring Boot and the client-side using React. Containerized with Docker.

projects.name: Gym Flow
projects.description: A mobile-ready application designed for fitness enthusiasts tracking workouts outdoors. Features responsive interface and social integration capabilities.

projects.name: E-store / Bookstore Backend
projects.description: A robust backend system built with Python, Flask/Django, and SQL. Features Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) and optimized queries for inventory management.

projects.name: AI Telegram Bot
projects.description: A Telegram bot utilizing the Gemini API for generative AI functionalities. Containerized and deployed on Google Cloud Space.

certifications: Functional Testing & Gamer Testing (80 hours) - UTN FRC / EPAM

Gen AI: Unlock Foundational Concepts - Google Cloud
